summary: List manual holds for a given invoice
description: Return a list of all manual holds for a given invoice

parameters.name: invoice_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the invoice to retrieve manual holds

id.description: Primary ID of the manual hold

created_by.description: Full name of user who created the manual hold

updated_by.description: Full name of the user who last updated the manual hold

invoice_id.description: ID of the invoice for which the hold is created. This is required if the hold_type is `invoice`.

hold_type.description: Type of hold. Can either be 'invoice' or 'vendor'

vendor_id.description: Id of the vendor for which the hold is created. This is required if the hold_type is `vendor`.

visible_to_vendor.description: If true manual holds will be visible to vendors
